Function.Inference: The entire track functions as an infinite loop, indicated by the D.C. at bar 76.

Section.Inference: A four-bar introductory vamp leading into the primary melody with a rhythmic bassline.
A contrasting flowing melody introduced over a new accompaniment texture.
A direct return to the primary melody.
Return of the introductory chords merging into an instrumental vamp lacking a main melody.
A sparse, new melodic idea played over the accompaniment texture from Theme B.
Another direct return to the primary melody.
Return of the syncopated chordal section, ending with a D.C. to loop the track.
